commands.review_summary:
The branch makes Codex migration provider detection call `discoverCodexSource` with app-server plugin inventory disabled, adds an options parameter to source discovery, and adds provider tests that assert detection does not call the app-server boundary.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main calls provider detection during onboarding, Codex detection calls source discovery, and source discovery unconditionally reaches the app-server-backed plugin inventory helper. The PR body also supplies after-fix live output showing a real onboarding command completed without invoking the fake `codex` binary.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because the PR already contains the focused code and test change with sufficient real behavior proof; the remaining action is normal maintainer review and merge validation.

target.title: fix(codex): avoid app-server probe during onboarding detection
